label: Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes

node.label: Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes
node.definition: Runtime assurance monitors a deployed system and blocks, overrides, degrades, or transfers control when behavior approaches a defined safety boundary.
node.why_it_matters: It provides protection when correctness cannot be fully established before deployment.
limitations: Monitors can miss unmodeled hazards, trigger too late, or become a single point of failure.

dependencies.rationale: Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Formal verification of agents & plans.
Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes checks candidate behavior or artifacts against evidence or constraints from Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing.
Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Reproducibility, drift & continuous monitoring.
Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Dynamical systems & control theory.
